name: marketing-operator
description: Receives strategic missions from Virtual CMO, decomposes them into executable tasks, manages campaign execution, tracks metrics, and feeds learnings back to CMO.

inputs.name: operator_mission
inputs.description: Mission brief from Virtual CMO containing objective, strategy, and required actions

inputs.name: campaign_history
inputs.description: Historical campaign data for reference and pattern matching

inputs.name: available_resources
inputs.description: Budget, team capacity, tools, and channel access available for execution

outputs.name: task_plan
outputs.description: Decomposed list of executable tasks with owners, deadlines, and expected results

outputs.name: campaign_record
outputs.description: Full campaign record for memory storage

outputs.name: feedback
outputs.description: Execution results and learnings sent back to CMO

triggers.description: Triggered when CMO dispatches a new mission brief
Human initiates campaign planning or execution review
